d: Niru prioritizes the [[weakest]] ally and casts a spell to protect them from a [[fatal blow]], turning them into a Spirit and restoring their HP to [[45%]] of max HP. The Spirit can only deal [[45%]] of its original damage while losing an increasing amount of HP every second. Once its HP runs out, the Spirit will be defeated.
For every (up to [[5]]) non-summoned enemy defeated, the blessed ally restores an extra [[10%]] of max HP when entering the Spirit form.
For every non-summoned enemy defeated, the ally in Spirit form restores [[10%]] of max HP (up to [[5]] times for each character).
Ally in Spirit form deals [[55%]] of the original damage.
Ally in Spirit form deals [[65%]] of the original damage.
Niru attacks the [[weakest]] enemy, dealing [[120%]]<ATK> damage plus damage equal to [[0.3]] times the target's lost HP. The additional damage cannot exceed [[450%]]<ATK>.
Increases additional damage to [[0.35]] times of the target's lost HP, up to [[525%]]<ATK>.
Increases additional damage to [[0.4]] times of the target's lost HP, up to [[600%]]<ATK>.
Increases additional damage to [[0.45]] times of the target's lost HP, up to [[600%]]<ATK>.

Niru drains the life force of all enemies, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to each enemy, plus [[3%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[70%]]<ATK>. He then restores an equal amount of HP to the [[weakest]] ally.
The damage dealt to each enemy is increased to [[160%]]<ATK>, plus [[3.5%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[80%]]<ATK>.
The damage dealt to each enemy is increased to [[170%]]<ATK>, plus [[4%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[90%]]<ATK>.
The damage dealt to each enemy is increased to [[180%]]<ATK>, plus [[5%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP by [[17%]] during battle.
Increases HP by [[23%]] during battle.
Increases HP by [[29%]] during battle.
Niru casts Ultimate on the nearest ally without consuming Energy when a battle starts, prioritizing the ally behind himself.
The Spirits will not lose HP over time until all allies enter Spirit form for [[8]]s.
Until all allies enter Spirit form for [[10]]s.
Until all allies enter Spirit form for [[12]]s.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Life Drain, 13 Ranged DEF.

d: Niru's Soul Reaping prevents the enemy from recovering HP for [[8]]s.

Replaces normal attacks with Spirit Devour, which deals only [[75%]] of the skill's original damage. When Spirit Devour heals Shemira or Daimon, it also increases their Phys DEF and Magic DEF by [[60%]] for [[8]]s.
